content.text:
I'll help you with those smart home controls right away.

<tool_call>tool: lights_off</tool_call>

<tool_call>tool: lock_doors</tool_call>

<tool_call>tool: set_thermostat, temp: 68</tool_call>

Done! I've turned off all the lights, locked all the doors, and set your thermostat to 68°F.

prompt: Turn off all lights, lock the doors, and set thermostat to 68F
